    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "category_sales = df.groupby('Category')['Sales'].sum()\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(8,5))\n",
        "\n",
        "category_sales.plot(kind='bar')\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.title('Sales by Category')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Category')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Total Sales')\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.show()\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 577
        },
        "id": "pS6gxPIwAIgY",
        "outputId": "7c5b0a12-9e5a-499b-b19a-28b30d9473e8"
      },
      "execution_count": 20,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 800x500 with 1 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "category_profit = df.groupby('Category')['Profit'].sum()\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(8,5))\n",
        "\n",
        "category_profit.plot(kind='bar')\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.title('Profit by Category')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Category')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Profit')\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 577
        },
        "id": "bK3X8ZXpANkz",

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "regional_sales = df.groupby('Region')['Sales'].sum()\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(8,5))\n",

        "\n",
        "plt.show()"

    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "df['Order Date'] = pd.to_datetime(df['Order Date'])\n",
        "\n",
        "monthly_sales = df.groupby(df['Order Date'].dt.month)['Sales'].sum()\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(10,5))\n",
        "\n",
        "monthly_sales.plot(kind='line', marker='o')\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.title('Monthly Sales Trend')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Month')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Sales')\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.grid(True)\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 487
        },
        "id": "zS8DeMrSAX_l",
        "outputId": "317bcf2e-d38e-4f6b-d3aa-8ba88dced846"
      },
      "execution_count": 23,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 1000x500 with 1 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "plt.figure(figsize=(8,5))\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.scatter(df['Discount'], df['Profit'])\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.title('Discount vs Profit')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Discount')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Profit')\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 487
        },
        "id": "PeZnHrJgAeHu",
        "outputId": "970812e3-6cbe-4656-80ee-caef434f0688"
      },
      "execution_count": 24,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 800x500 with 1 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "print(\"\\nKEY INSIGHTS\")\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"1. Technology category generated highest sales and profit.\")\n",
        "print(\"2. Higher discounts negatively impacted profits.\")\n",
        "print(\"3. West region contributed maximum sales.\")\n",
        "print(\"4. Furniture category showed lower profitability.\")"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "00I2B8epAj1R",
        "outputId": "aa9afbe3-f987-4177-e543-137dcdac8c30"
      },
      "execution_count": 25,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "\n",
            "KEY INSIGHTS\n",
            "1. Technology category generated highest sales and profit.\n",
            "2. Higher discounts negatively impacted profits.\n",
            "3. West region contributed maximum sales.\n",
            "4. Furniture category showed lower profitability.\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    }
